title.en: The Art of the Long View

summary.en: Peter Schwartz's classic introduction to scenario thinking: identify driving forces, critical uncertainties, and multiple plausible futures before committing to one strategy.
summary.zh: Peter Schwartz 关于情景思考的经典入门：先识别驱动力、关键不确定性和多个可能未来，再决定战略选择。

recommendation.en: Read this before turning Business Model Environment into scenario planning. It helps teams avoid single-forecast thinking and compare which moves stay robust across futures.
recommendation.zh: 在把商业模式环境扫描升级为情景规划前，推荐先读它。它能帮助团队避免单一预测，并比较哪些战略动作在多个未来下都稳健。

sources.label: Peter Schwartz · The Art of the Long View · Currency Doubleday · 1991

headline.en: Use scenarios to think beyond the next forecast
headline.zh: 用情景思考超越下一份预测

whyOpen.en: Open this when uncertainty is high and the team needs stories, driving forces, early signals, and strategic implications instead of one forecast.
whyOpen.zh: 当不确定性很高，团队需要故事、驱动力、早期信号和战略含义，而不是单一预测时读这本。

audience.en: Founders, strategy teams, policy thinkers, and leaders preparing for long-range uncertainty.
audience.zh: 适合创业者、战略团队、政策思考者，以及准备面对长期不确定性的领导者。

commonMisreads.en: The goal is not to predict the future; it is to make better decisions across plausible futures.
commonMisreads.zh: 目标不是预测未来，而是在多个可信未来中做出更好的决策。

firstSteps.en: Name the focal decision before collecting trends.
firstSteps.zh: 在收集趋势前，先命名核心决策。

firstSteps.en: Use scenario stories to test whether current business-model assumptions survive different futures.
firstSteps.zh: 用情景故事测试当前商业模式假设能否穿越不同未来。

outcomes.en: You can build scenario logics and identify signals that would change today's strategy.
outcomes.zh: 你能构建情景逻辑，并识别哪些信号会改变今天的战略。

practicePrompts.en: Which assumption in your model breaks under one plausible future but survives under another?
practicePrompts.zh: 你模型里的哪条假设在一种可信未来下会断裂，但在另一种未来下仍成立？
